title: Anthropic releases Claude Opus 4.7 with 1M context, native skills runtime
summary: Opus 4.7 ships a built-in Skills runtime that lets agents discover and invoke long-form workflows without prompt-stuffing. Pricing held flat against 4.6.

title: OpenAI revamps Agent Tooling spec, adds first-class memory + retry primitives
summary: The new spec deprecates ad-hoc function calling in favour of typed tool manifests with built-in retry, idempotency keys, and per-tool memory namespaces.

title: DeepSeek-Coder V3 tops SWE-bench, weights released under permissive license
summary: V3 jumps 12 points on SWE-bench Verified versus V2 and is competitive with Claude Sonnet 4.6 at a fraction of the inference cost. GGUFs available at launch.

title: NVIDIA announces Agent OS for RTX, runs on-device agents with system tool access
summary: Agent OS provides a sandboxed runtime with permissioned access to filesystem, browser, and clipboard. Targets developer workflows on Windows.

title: Simon Willison: Anthropic's Skills system is the most underrated developer feature of 2026
summary: Argues Skills will eat the 'prompt library' market and reshape how teams package institutional knowledge for LLMs. Includes a tutorial for building one.

title: EU AI Office publishes Code of Practice Round 4, lowers systemic-risk threshold
summary: Compute threshold dropped to 3e24 FLOPs. Signatories must run misuse evals against new agentic-action category within 60 days.

title: Cursor 3.0 ships with persistent multi-repo agents
summary: Workspace agents can now operate across multiple repositories with shared memory. PR review and refactor flows get dedicated UI.

title: Hugging Face publishes voice-cloning ethics framework, gates new TTS model
summary: New consent-and-attribution framework gates the public release of a 3B-parameter voice model. Enterprise license available without gating.
